comment: Brian voiceover v2 for the 3-minute WorldCup26 Launch Film — a cinematic, emotional 'your summer, your stake' story (vs v1's product walkthrough). Same scene timings: S1 0-26, S2 26-48, S3 48-82, S4 82-116, S5 116-146, S6 146-168, S7 168-180.

lines.text: For one month, every four years, football belongs to everyone.
Forty-eight nations. A billion heartbeats. One shared summer.
But this time, you're not just watching it happen — you're in it.
It begins in seconds. Two taps, and you've joined the game.
Come in with a friend's code, and you're already connected.
One tap with Google, and your story starts.
Now the choice that's yours alone — three nations, out of forty-eight.
The giants you believe in, and the outsiders you can't ignore.
Weigh them, trust your gut, and commit.
Then lock it in, before the opening whistle.
And then it's real. Every match they play, you feel it.
The braver your pick, the bigger it pays.
Every round an underdog survives, your reward multiplies.
Goal by goal, the whole board shifts beneath you.
Forty-eight thousand dollars, waiting for the top ten.
And night after night, you watch your teams climb.
Closer to the top. Closer to the prize.
Until the very last whistle, when anyone's story can still end in glory.
And the best part? You don't play it alone.
Bring your friends in and earn as they win — three percent, then five down the line.
Your circle grows, and your rewards grow with it.
Forty-eight teams. One unforgettable month. Your story, your call.
This summer, rise with them. WorldCup twenty-six dot world.
